name: Biscotti Napoletani
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Combine all ingredients except honey and water in a mixing bowl and stir for about 1-2 minutes to mix.
3. Add the honey and water and stir until a firm dough forms.
4. Remove the dough from the bowl and divide it into two halves.
5. Roll each half into a log, approximately 15 inches long.
6. Place both logs on a jelly roll pan lined with parchment or buttered wax paper, ensuring they are well apart.
7. Bake for about 30 minutes until well risen, firm, and dark golden in color.
8. Remove from the oven and let the logs cool slightly.
9. Slice the logs at 1/2-inch intervals diagonally.
10. Return the cut biscotti to the pan with the cut side down and bake for an additional 15 minutes until lightly colored and dry.
11. Allow to cool on the pan before storing in a tin; they keep well.
